Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Elders]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Elders stir in the Aion and beyond.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — The Blackwatch defend the realm from the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — The Elders are not dead or gone, but are present and mostly not sleeping.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Elders are strange, eternal beings with powers beyond human control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Elders are subjects of ancient accounts that have been questioned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Elders are a group that some Guilds might work under the influence of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — With the Emperor gone, the Elders have become more active.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Watchmen might be acolytes of the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Listening to the Elders for too long can cause madness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Elders can see the unalloyed truth through Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Elders' actions lack rhyme or reason.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Jerri calls out to her Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Elders can be bound into ships through bone, blood, or an artifact.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Ancient Elders are hazards in the deep Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Elders are a type of potent natural force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — If a Regent is corrupted, a quarter of the Empire falls under the rule of an Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor does not want the Elders to win.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 1''' — Some people join Elder cults because they believe the Elders will save them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Elders sent something to spy on Bliss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Elders and their spawn perform foul incursions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — The Elders are a group associated with tentacles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Empire must defend the world from Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Elders can be used as partners or parasites.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Elders have gone to war before when plans diverged.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The appearance of the crack in the sky is known to be caused by Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Elders have a plan involving the Optasia and the Emperor's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — The Elders wish to consume humankind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — The Elders are a group that might be playing games.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor seeks to prevent the rise of the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Elders are considered by many to be extinct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Deception, illusion, and seduction are the ways of the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Elders are described as serpents and authors of darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — The Elders are capable of cracking the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Elders are a high priority for all.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Empire needs to be strong enough to face down the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Elders are moving.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Jyrine attributes the strange events to Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Elders are tearing the sky in half.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Elders speak in a chorus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Elders sprung from the void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Elders are a group Calder was accused of collaborating with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Elders are alien to humanity but not evil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Calder intends to oppose the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The void is the home of the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Calder kept knowledge secret from the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The Elders want to escape rather than destroy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The woman intended to sell Calder to Elders.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — The secrets of the Elders can be unlocked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Regents intend to cooperate against the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor believes it is Shera's responsibility to oppose the Elders.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
